required_non_goals: Do not rewrite the whole project in the first transformation step.
Do not mutate Capability Registry from ArchitectSkill.

teacher_review.project_condition: small CLI with one pure transform and filesystem read/write helpers
expected_spec_behavior: select normalize_text as first extraction contract
keep load/write helpers as source evidence, not first candidate
preserve non-goals and Foundry gate constraints
known_risks: write_json has filesystem side effects and should not be first
